name: Howard Hanson
description: American composer, conductor, educator and music theorist (1896–1981)
abstract: Howard Harold Hanson (October 28, 1896 – February 26, 1981) was an American composer, conductor, educator and music theorist. As director for forty years of the Eastman School of Music, he raised its quality and provided opportunities for commissioning and performing American classical music.
